sources.title: Masculin Féminin 1966 No Se Puede Vivir Sin Ternura...
sources.description: Title: Masculin féminin: 15 faits précis (1966) Directed by: Jean-Luc Godard Date of birth: 3 December 1930, Paris, France Writing credits: Jean-Luc Godard Music: Jean-Jacques Debout Year: 1966 Country: France | sweden Language: French | English | Swedish Color: Black & White Runtime: 110 min.

metadata.Plot: Godard presents his trailer for one of the iconic Nouvelle Vague monuments, the classic "Masculin Féminin". An amusing soundtrack, several clips from the film are exhibited in the usual Godard style, with the titles telling us tha...
metadata.Actors: Chantal Goya, Marlène Jobert, Jean-Pierre Léaud
